ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the city is located */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city classification */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the city */,
  "area_km" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the city mayor */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES city_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the province is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the city classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population data is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city for the given year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_history_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, planner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city for which the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_economy_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "literacy_rate" TEXT /* Literacy rate of the city */,
  "num_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the education data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_healthcare" (
  "healthcare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "hospital_beds" INTEGER /* Number of hospital beds in the city */,
  "doctor_patient_ratio" TEXT /* Doctor-patient ratio in the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the healthcare data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthcare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_healthcare_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "air_quality_index" TEXT /* Air quality index of the city */,
  "green_spaces" TEXT /* Green spaces in the city (in square kilometers) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the environmental data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_environment_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_public_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public safety record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "crime_rate" TEXT /* Crime rate of the city */,
  "emergency_response_time" TEXT /* Average emergency response time in the city (in minutes) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the public safety data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_public_safety_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
